title: Lead AI Engineer | Applied AI Lead | LLM/VLM | AI Videos | Central
description:
Our client is a marketing AI technology company focused on becoming a strategic AI partner to the automotive industry. Its platform integrates AI-driven short-form content, live streaming, and CRM intelligence to help businesses improve marketing efficiency and customer engagement. As the company scales its AI capabilities, it is seeking an AI Technical Lead to strengthen its AI Technology Team. This role reports directly to the AI Technical Director and is located in the Central – easily accessible.

Responsibilities of Lead AI Engineer

  • Lead hands-on development of unmanned AI live streaming systems powered by virtual AI hosts.
  • Design and implement core AI modules across AI motion, multimodal intelligence, LLM/VLM, and conversational AI that spans text-to-video, image-to-video, video understanding, and multimodal generation.
  • Lead AI language initiatives across LLM applications, fine-tuning, RAG, AI agents, and multilingual systems, scaling solutions from proof-of-concept (POC) and MVP stages to robust, production-grade systems.
  • Design, fine-tune, and deploy LLM, VLM, and multimodal models for production, optimizing latency, accuracy, reliability, and cost efficiency.
  • Develop and optimize AI motion and virtual host behaviour, including movement, expression, speech, and scene-aware adaptation for live and recorded content.
  • Architect and maintain fully autonomous live-streaming workflows, covering pre-recorded video ingestion, real-time orchestration, and scene-aware automation.
  • Build LLM/NLP-powered AI customer service systems to handle real-time audience inquiries, engagement, and order-related interactions at scale.
  • Develop AI-driven analytics and insights for audience engagement and purchasing behaviour to support business and product decision-making.
  • Provide technical leadership by mentoring AI engineers, driving architecture and execution, and collaborating closely with the AI Technical Director to align strategy and delivery.

Requirements:

  • PhD in Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Machine Learning, or related field.
  • Strong academic background with published research in reputable AI journals or conferences.
  • Hands-on experience in AI motion & videos, multimodal AI, or LLM, NLP & Agent systems.
  • Proven experience translating AI research into production-grade, commercial systems.
  • Prior experience in top-tier AI firms, startups, or research labs with leading technical teams.


Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Email Address: jobs@recruitpedia.sg

EA License No: 19C9682
